note: Adjust task_slug values for your token plan. Session models are chosen by the developer — not by skills.

cursor.session: Model picker on the Agent chat before triggering the skill
cursor.task_spawn: Task tool model parameter — slug from your available-models list

claude_code.task_spawn: Task tool model parameter when the host exposes it; else omit

plan.purpose: Scoping, Testing Strategy, multi-repo analysis, assumptions

implement.purpose: Write code and tests, self-review, stage for developer commit

refactor.purpose: Post-green tidy-up — same bar as implement

review-orchestrator.purpose: Fresh/refresh aggregation, consistency, verdict — fresh eyes vs implement

cursor.session_hint: Reasoning tier — pick a different family or tier than implement

claude_code.session_hint: Opus (new chat, not the implement session)

review-worker.purpose: Per-file FILE_REVIEWER / STYLE_FILE_REVIEWER — scripted, JSON output

style-worker.purpose: Mechanical style fixes — same tier as review-worker
